---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for OrchidLife
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is this related to a problem?**
A clear description of the problem. E.g. "I'm always frustrated when..."

**Describe the feature**
What you'd like to see added or changed.

**Alternatives considered**
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've thought of.

**Additional context**
Any other context, mockups, or screenshots.
